name: Eggs Portugal
recipeInstructions:
1. In a greased 9x13 caserole dish, arrange the bread cubes.
2. Brown the sausage into very fine pieces and drain. Top the bread with cheese.
3. Place the sausage on top of the cheese and bread.
4. Mix the eggs and milk together and pour over the sausage, bread, and cheese. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
5. The next morning, mix the vermouth and soup (no extra water) together and spread over the top of the casserole.
6. Bake at 300°F for 1 hour.
